hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+reset([[:space:]]|$|;|&|\|)' && printf '%s' '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "git reset is forbidden in this project. Destructive resets have caused work loss multiple times. Use `git stash` to set work aside, or `git checkout -- <file>` / `git restore <file>` to revert a specific path. If you genuinely need to reset HEAD, ask the user first."}' || exit 0
